info.name: Auth-Mailer-API
info.description:
# 📑 Auth-Mailer-API – Postman Documentation

Auth-Mailer-API is a RESTful service that provides **user authentication** and **email sending capabilities**. This documentation is designed for Postman to help developers test, explore, and integrate the API quickly.

## 🔑 Authentication

- **Type:** JWT (JSON Web Token)
    
- CódigoAuthorization: Bearer
    

## 📬 Base URL

Código

```
https://auth-mailer-api.onrender.com

 ```

## ⚠️ Error Responses

- **400 Bad Request:** Missing or invalid parameters.
    
- **401 Unauthorized:** Invalid or missing token.
    
- **404 Not Found:** Resource not found.
    
- **500 Internal Server Error:** Unexpected server issue.
    

## 🛠️ Postman Setup

1. Import this collection into Postman.
    
2. Set the **Base URL** as an environment variable (`{{base_url}}`).
    
3. Add an **Authorization** header with your JWT token.
    
4. Test endpoints individually or chain them in workflows.

item.description:
The **Users** folder contains endpoints related to user management in the Auth-Mailer-API. These endpoints allow developers to register, authenticate, and manage users within the system.

### 📌 Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description | **Authorization** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/users` | Get all users | Token is Required |
| GET | `/users/:id` | Get a single user by ID | Token is Required |
| POST | `/users` | Create a new user | Not Required |
| PUT | `/users/:id` | Update an existing user | Token is required |
| DELETE | `/users/:id` | Delete an user by ID | Token is required |
| GET | `/users/verify/:code` | Verify user email with code from email_codes | Not Required |
| POST | `/users/login` | Login User | Not Required |
| POST | `/users/reset_password` | Resest user password | Not Required |
| POST | `/users/reset_password/:code` | Update password with code generated from email_codes | Not required |
